title: JMeter Performance Dashboard
description: Live JMeter load test metrics from InfluxDB 2.x. Select a workload to filter all panels. The test_run_id and time range are pre-filled when you open Grafana from a test run.

list.name: Test Start / Stop
list.rawQuery:
from(bucket: "jmeter")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "events")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.application == "${workload_name}")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "title"])

list.name: workload_name
list.label: Workload
list.description: Filter by workload (maps to the InfluxDB application tag).

list.name: test_run_id
list.label: Test Run ID
list.description: Execution ID (pre-filled from the platform run URL). Used for reference only — filter by time range to isolate a specific run.

options.content: Workload: ${workload_name}Run ID: ${test_run_id}Metrics update every 5s · InfluxDB bucket: jmeter · application tag = workload_name

panels.title: Total Requests
panels.description: Total number of samples collected for this workload in the selected time window.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "jmeter")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jmeter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.application == "${workload_name}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.statut == "all" and r.transaction == "all" and r._field == "hit")
  |> sum()

panels.title: Error Rate
panels.description: Average error rate across all samples in the selected window.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "jmeter")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jmeter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.application == "${workload_name}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.statut == "all" and r.transaction == "all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "countError" or r._field == "hit")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "application", "transaction", "statut"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if exists r.hit and r.hit > 0.0 then r.countError / r.hit * 100.0 else 0.0, _field: "error_rate_pct"}))
  |> mean(column: "_value")

panels.title: Avg Response Time
panels.description: Mean response time across all transactions in the selected window.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "jmeter")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jmeter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.application == "${workload_name}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.statut == "all" and r.transaction == "all" and r._field == "avg")
  |> mean()

panels.title: P95 Response Time
panels.description: 95th percentile response time — the SLO reference metric.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "jmeter")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jmeter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.application == "${workload_name}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.statut == "all" and r.transaction == "all" and r._field == "pct95.0")
  |> mean()

panels.title: Throughput
panels.description: Mean requests per second across the test window.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "jmeter")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jmeter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.application == "${workload_name}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.statut == "all" and r.transaction == "all" and r._field == "throughput")
  |> mean()

panels.title: Peak Virtual Users
panels.description: Maximum concurrent virtual users seen during the test.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "jmeter")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jmeter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.application == "${workload_name}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.transaction == "internal" and r._field == "maxAT")
  |> max()

panels.title: Response Time — Avg / P90 / P95 / P99 (all transactions)
panels.description: Aggregated response time percentiles across all samplers. Filtered by workload_name (application tag).

targets.query:
from(bucket: "jmeter")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jmeter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.application == "${workload_name}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.statut == "all" and r.transaction == "all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "avg" or r._field == "pct90.0" or r._field == "pct95.0" or r._field == "pct99.0")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "response_times")

panels.title: Active Virtual Users
panels.description: Number of concurrent JMeter threads actively running. Source: internal measurement, maxAT field.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "jmeter")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jmeter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.application == "${workload_name}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.transaction == "internal" and r._field == "maxAT")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "active_vus")

panels.title: Throughput — Requests/sec by Endpoint
panels.description: Per-sampler requests per second. Shows which endpoints receive the most load.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "jmeter")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jmeter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.application == "${workload_name}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.statut == "all" and r.transaction != "all" and r.transaction != "internal")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "throughput")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "throughput")

panels.title: Error Count by Endpoint
panels.description: Number of failed samples per interval per sampler. Source: countError field (statut=all).

targets.query:
from(bucket: "jmeter")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jmeter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.application == "${workload_name}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.statut == "all" and r.transaction != "all" and r.transaction != "internal")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "countError")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "errors")

panels.title: Avg Response Time — Per Endpoint
panels.description: Mean response time per sampler. Lets you identify which endpoint is the bottleneck.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "jmeter")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jmeter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.application == "${workload_name}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.statut == "all" and r.transaction != "all" and r.transaction != "internal")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "avg")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "avg_rt_per_endpoint")

panels.title: P95 Response Time — Per Endpoint
panels.description: 95th percentile response time per sampler over time.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "jmeter")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jmeter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.application == "${workload_name}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.statut == "all" and r.transaction != "all" and r.transaction != "internal")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pct95.0")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "p95_per_endpoint")

panels.title: Error Rate % — Over Time (all transactions)
panels.description: Percentage of failed samples per interval. Red threshold at 1%.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "jmeter")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jmeter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.application == "${workload_name}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.statut == "all" and r.transaction == "all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "countError" or r._field == "hit")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "application", "transaction", "statut"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if exists r.hit and r.hit > 0.0 then r.countError / r.hit * 100.0 else 0.0, _field: "error_rate_pct"}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "error_rate")
